selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: As an LLM, I believe that managing and dealing with fake content on social media is a crucial aspect of maintaining a safe and trustworthy online environment. Here are some strategies that individuals and organizations can employ to detect and mitigate the spread of false information:
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: 1. Use fact-checking tools: There are several independent fact-checking organizations that provide accurate information on various topics. Individuals and organizations can leverage these tools to verify the authenticity of content before sharing it.
